steps.title: Identify the causal relationship
steps.content: Dominguez wanted to incorporate randomness (goal), then employed techniques that produced randomness (implementation). The transition must show how the second sentence flows from the first.

steps.title: Match the transition to the logic
steps.content: ”With this in mind,” means “considering this goal”—it treats the second sentence as the realization of the stated desire. “On the contrary,” “In conclusion,” and “Regardless” misfire: they introduce contradiction, wrap up falsely, or dismiss the goal respectively. That matches choice A — A is correct.
